wrb.class.assault.description: Universal soldier for assault operations. Armed with a rifle and basic equipment for close and medium range combat.
wrb.class.machine_gunner.description: Specialist in suppressing enemies with fire. Uses a machine gun to provide fire support to the team.
wrb.class.medic.description: Field medic for saving allies. Equipped with medical supplies and can heal wounded teammates.
wrb.class.crew.description: Vehicle Crew. Specialists in operating and maintaining combat vehicles. Can occupy driver and gunner seats in vehicles.
wrb.class.anti_tank.description: Fighter against armored vehicles and fortifications. Armed with anti-tank weapons to destroy enemy vehicles.
wrb.class.engineer.description: Engineer for construction and fortifications. Can build defensive structures and repair vehicles.
wrb.class.sniper.description: Long-range sniper. Specialist in precision shooting at long distances. Equipped with a sniper rifle and optics.
wrb.class.sso.description: Special Operations. Elite unit with the best equipment. Available only with pjmbasemod.class.sso permission.
wrb.class.uav_operator.description: Unmanned Aerial Vehicle Operator. Specialist in reconnaissance and surveillance using UAVs. Equipped with drone control equipment and optical devices.
wrb.class.scout.description: Scout Hunter. Specialist in counter-sniper operations and enemy tracking. Equipped with light gear for fast movement and target detection.
wrb.class.ew_specialist.description: Specialist in countering unmanned aerial vehicles. Equipped with EW and drone detection equipment.
wrb.class.spn.description: 4th Special Operations Brigade. Elite unit specializing in special operations. Equipped with the best tactical gear and weapons. Available only for Team 1.
